titleStmt.title: SII 17.264: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 264. (A.R. No. 241 of 1904.) KŪṈIMĒḌU, TINDIVANAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the west base of the ruined Īśvara temple.

The details of date given, viz., Ś. 1455, Nandana, Kaṟkaṭaka śu 7, Monday, Uttirā ḍam, are irregular. Ś. 1455 corresponding to the cyclic year Nandana had not expired as stated in the inscription but was current. This epigraph mentions Tirumalaidēvamahārāja, who is probably identical with Periya Tirumalaidēva-mahārāja, the brotherin-law and general of the king.

It records the gift of a number of taxes and levies, for worship, services and repairs in the temple of god Śūranāyakar Tambirānār by Vīrabhadra Mudaliyār, the [Śi]vapūjaka[r] of Kōyambēḍu, the agent of Tirumalaidēva-mahārāja, as a dharma of lord (svāmi) Tirumalaidēva-mahārāja. The taxes and levies mentioned are the nāṭṭāyam and udirittīrvai from Muññūṟṟuvachchiṉmai alias Kūṉimēḍu in••••• chchiṉmai alias Ōymā-nāḍu alias Vijayarājēndraśōḻa-valanāḍu, the udiri-nāṭṭāyam collected in the area up to Vēlur in the south and in the area up to Marakkāṉam and his fief in the north, all tīrvai in force, including those on grains such as rice and paddy, on oil and ghee, on palm-jaggery, pepper, turmeric, betelnut, gallnut, sugar, cumin, fenugreek-seed, mañjiliyīḻam, ginger, etc., the levy on textiles (tuṇḍappiḍavai) in the south and the other levies on sundry articles.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
U svasti . śrīmatu mahāmaṇṭalecura Irājātirājaṉ rājaparamecuraṉ śrī vīrappiratāpaṉ Accu taiyatevamahāirāyar
piṟutuvirācciyam paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa kali Ati cakāttam Āyirattu nānūṟṟu Aṉpa(pa)ttañcu mel cellāniṉṟa naṉ(ta)taṉa varuṣattu kaṟkaṭakanāyaṟṟu pū
ṟuva pakṣattu cattamiyum Uttirāṭamum comavāramum peṟṟa Iṟṟai nāḷ tuṭṭa niṟpāk tirumalaitevamakārācāviṉ kāriyattukku kaṭavarāṉa
koyampeṭu civapūcakar vīrapatramutaliyār svāmi tirumalaidevamahārājāvin tarmmamākak kūṉi meṭu Uṭaiyava taṉmacātaṉam paṇṇik kuṭuttapaṭi cūranāyakar
tampirānār Aṅkaraṅkavaipoka mahāpūcai tiruppaṇi naṭattumpaṭikku svāmitirumalaide cciṉmaiyāṉa yoymānāṭāṉa vijayarāya
(ya) rājendracoḻavaḷanāṭṭu muñnūṟṟu vac cīṉmaiyāṉa kūṉimeṭṭil ṉaṭantu varukiṟa nāṭṭāyam Utirittirvai teṟku vaḻi velūr vaḻi vaṭakku ṉam paṇṇai vaḻi marak kāṉattu
vaḻiyiluṇṭāṉa Utiri nāṭṭāyam pūrvvam naṭantu varukiṟa tirvai nellup poti Aricip poti Uḷḷiṭṭa palatāṉiyavaṟkat tīrvaiyum Eṇṇai neyt tīrvaiyum karuppu kaṭṭi
kaṭaicarakku miḷaku mañcaḷ pākkuc cukkuk kaṭukkāy cakkarai cīrakam ventayam maṟṟum Uṇ ṭāṉa kaṭaic carakkut tīrvaiyum mañciliyiḻam yiñcit tīrvaiyum
teṟku vaḻi tuṇṭappiṭavait tīrvaiyum maṟṟum cillaṟaic carakkukku Uṇṭāṉa tīrvaiyum tampirāṉār cūranāyakar makaāpūcai tiruppaṇikku kaṭṭaḷaiyiṭṭapa
ṭiyāle yinta nāṭṭāyam yutirit tīrvai Uṇṭāṉatu cantirātittavaraiyum naṭantuvarakkaṭa vatākavum yi(ru)nta tanmattai naṭattiṉavarkaḷukku Aṟupattu mūvar peṟṟa pe
ṟu pe kaṭavarkaḷākavum yinta taṉmattai Akitam paṇṇinavarkaḷ virotam coṉṉavarkaḷ keṅkaik karaiyile kārāmpacuvaikoṉṟa toṣattileyum taṉṉiṭa mātā pitāvai kurukkaḷaik koṉṟa toṣatti
le pokakkaṭavarkaḷākavum vīrabhadran Eḻuttu kaṉakarāyār kaṇakkappiḷḷai rāvut taṉāyaṉ Eḻuttu kaṇakka taṇṭār Eḻuttu
svadattādviguṇam puṇyam paradattān pālanam . paradattāpahāreṇa svadattanniṣchalam bhavet .
dānapālanayormmaddhye dānācchreyonupālanam . dānātsvarggamavāpnoti pālanādacyutam padam .
Digital edition of SII 17.264 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
